protein_name: Essential for the control of the cell cycle at the G2/M (mitosis) transition. Belongs to the cyclin family. Cyclin AB subfamily. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: centrosome; cyclin-dependent protein kinase holoenzyme complex; cytoplasm; cytosol; Golgi apparatus; membrane; microtubule cytoskeleton; microtubule organizing center; nucleus
raw_fields.Molecular Function: cyclin-dependent protein serine/threonine kinase regulator activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: cell division; G1/S transition of mitotic cell cycle; mitotic cell cycle phase transition
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: CCNB2; cyclin B2; G2/mitotic-specific cyclin-B2; HsT17299
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 9 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
